channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Bills offensive coordinator Joe Brady withdraws Saints head coaching candidacy: report
item.description: Despite already meeting with the New Orleans Saints brass for an initial interview, the Buffalo Bills assistant coach has declined a follow up conversation with the NFL franchise.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former NASCAR star Danica Patrick supports Trump revoking Fauci's security detail
item.description: Former NASCAR star Danica Patrick shared a news story about Anthony Fauci losing his security detail with a quote from President Trump, adding the caption "Damn right.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jets agree to terms with Broncos executive Darren Mougey to be their general manager
item.description: The New York Jets' lengthy searches are over, and they're pairing a first-time general manager with a first-time head coach to try to turn things around. Denver Broncos assistant general manager Darren Mougey agreed to terms Saturday with the Jets to become their GM.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK JR., Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Astros Fans have Bregman questions at FanFest
item.description: Astros fans at the annual FanFest are curious about the potential return of former third baseman Alex Bregman, with shortstop Jeremy Peña noting frequent inquiries about Bregman's status
item.dc:creator: Ari Alexander, KPRC 2

item.title: Harris English holds off Sam Stevens by a shot in the Farmers Insurance Open at Torrey Pines
item.description: Harris English held off hard-charging Sam Stevens to win the Farmers Insurance Open by one shot Saturday, securing his fifth career PGA Tour victory with a 1-over 73 in challenging weather at Torrey Pines.
item.dc:creator: Greg Beacham, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Runnin' Utes get swept by Baylor, 76-61
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a tough week offensively for the Utah basketball team. After scoring just 35 points against Houston, the Utes put up 61 in a 76-61 loss to Baylor Saturday at the Huntsman Center. Norchad Omier had 22 points and 12 rebounds, and V.J.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: USU improves to 18-2 after blowout win at Air Force
item.description: COLORADO SPRINGS, Colo. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State basketball team continues to roll through the Mountain West Conference. The Aggies improved to 8-1 in league play, 18-2 overall, picking up an 87-58 road win over Air Force at Clune Arena.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: San Diego Padres announce 2025 theme game schedule and giveaways
item.description: The San Diego Padres have unveiled their 2025 promotional schedule, featuring a variety of exciting giveaways, theme games and fan events throughout the season.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Vanderbilt fans storm court again as Commodores beat No. 9 Kentucky 74-69
item.description: Tyler Nickel’s 3-pointer with 1:50 left put Vanderbilt ahead to stay as the Commodores upset a Top 10 team on their home court for a second straight Saturday by beating No. 9 Kentucky 74-69.
item.dc:creator: Teresa M. Walker, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Student stampede injures several ahead of AU vs. Tennessee basketball game
item.description: AUBURN, Ala. (WRBL) – A chaotic scene unfolded Saturday morning outside Neville Arena as Auburn University students rushed to secure spots for the highly anticipated basketball game between #1 Auburn and #6 Tennessee.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth White, NewsNation

item.title: Olympic gymnast Suni Lee vows to never ski again after disastrous first experience
item.description: U.S. Olympian Suni Lee tried her hand at skiing for the first time this week, as seen in her Instagram story, but wound up face-down on the snow.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: ESPN's Stephen A. Smith says he feels like a fool for voting for Kamala Harris
item.description: Stephen A. Smith says he and others who voted for Kamala Harris in November's election feel like “d--- fools" due to the fact she never received a primary vote.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Boys Basketball: Kearny 67, Morse 53
item.description: The Komets were able to take down the Tigers tonight on Morse's homecourt, 67-53, as Kearny was led by Guards Caleb Fluhr and Julian Valladerez.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Avs GM MacFarland felt 'timing was right' to deal star forward Mikko Rantanen
item.description: Facing the prospect of Mikko Rantanen becoming an unrestricted free agent after this season, Colorado general manager Chris MacFarland felt the timing was right to trade the star forward and bolster the Avalanche’s roster for the future.
item.dc:creator: Ken Powtak, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Alex Bregman's door to re-sign with Astros is 'cracked' open, general manager says
item.description: Houston general manager Dana Brown says the door for re-signing free agent Alex Bregman is “cracked” open, but he acknowledges keeping the third baseman with the Astros would be a long shot.
item.dc:creator: Kristie Rieken, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Czech Olympic skier in medically induced coma following brain surgery after downhill fall in Germany
item.description: Tereza Nova, a veteran skier from Czechia, was placed in a medically induced coma after needing brain surgery to reduce swelling following a downhill crash in Germany.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chicago faces Philadelphia on 4-game home slide
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers (16-27, 11th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (19-26, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Bulls -3.5; over/under is 230.5 BOTTOM LINE: Chicago hosts Philadelphia looking to stop its four-game home slide.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: The sweet stench of NHL hockey
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Hockey players sweat buckets, perhaps more than any other athletes in any other sport. They are wearing sweaters, after all. "It's disgusting," said Utah Hockey Club center Liam O'Brien.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: RSL signs Brazilian goalkeeper Rafael Cabral
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake has gone into South America to find its new starting goalkeeper. RSL announced the signing of Brazilian keeper Rafael Cabral Tuesday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
